title: Hematoxylin and Eosin Staining (H&E) - Pregnant Female Reproductive TMC
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8it7v","text":"Here we describe the protocol for hematoxylin and eosin (H\u0026E) histological staining employed by the UC San Diego Human \u0026 Animal Tissue Technology Center. H\u0026E is used to distinguish nuclear and cytoplasmic cellular compartments and other cellular structures, as well as provide insights into overall patterns present within a given tissue.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"5r6hv","text":"Steps involving xylene or alcohol should be conducted in a fume hood; for the sake of simplicity, the author conducts all steps except water rinses in a fume hood.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"fju7f","text":"XYLENE: Flammable, toxic, avoid contact with eyes and skin","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fs45g","text":"100% REAGENT ALCOHOL: Flammable, poisonous, avoid contact with eyes and skin","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ajet5","text":"HEMATOXYLIN: Flammable, harmful vapors, poisonous, avoid contact with eyes, skin and clothing","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dk14s","text":"EOSIN: Harmful vapor, avoid contact with eyes, skin, and clothing","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cq54","text":"BLUING REAGENT: Avoid contact with eyes and skin","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5lhgm","text":"DEFINE REAGENT: Avoid contact with eyes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"4l6dh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8vndo","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"36fq0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d9stn","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{},"colTitles":["",""],"colWidths":["201","207"],"data":[["100% reagent alcohol","Fisher Chemical A962P-4"],["hematoxylin","Epredia 7212"],["eosin Y with phloxine","Epredia 71304"],["xylene","Fisher Chemical X5-4"],["define solution (Clarifier 2)","Epredia 7402"],["bluing solution","Epredia 7301"],["tap water",""],["coverslip, 24 x 30mm #1.5","VWR 48404-467"],["slides","Fisher Scientific 12-550-15"],["coverslip mounting solution","Cytoseal XYL 8312-4"],["Sakura 24 slide holder","Tissue-Tek 4465"],["slide staining dishes","Tissue-Tek 4456 or 4457"]],"guid":"A480738D63EB4A01ADF0028A92D8ED90","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["100% reagent alcohol","Fisher Chemical A962P-4"],["hematoxylin","Epredia 7212"],["eosin Y with phloxine","Epredia 71304"],["xylene","Fisher Chemical X5-4"],["define solution (Clarifier 2)","Epredia 7402"],["bluing solution","Epredia 7301"],["tap water",""],["coverslip, 24 x 30mm #1.5","VWR 48404-467"],["slides","Fisher Scientific 12-550-15"],["coverslip mounting solution","Cytoseal XYL 8312-4"],["Sakura 24 slide holder","Tissue-Tek 4465"],["slide staining dishes","Tissue-Tek 4456 or 4457"]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23]}}}}
steps: Place slides into a slide holder and air dry slides overnight prior to staining.
Prepare six slide staining dishes Xylene (2) 100% reagent alcohol (3) Tap water (1)
Submerge slides in the first xylene dish for 10 minutes. Gently mix up and down 3-5 times during incubation to facilitate wax removal.
Remove slides and submerge in the second xylene dish for 5 minutes. Gently mix up and down 3-5 times during incubation to facilitate wax removal.

Remove slides, draining off as much xylene as possible, and submerge in the first reagent alcohol dish for 2 minutes. Repeat twice more, removing and submerging into the next reagent alcohol dish, for a total of three submersions in reagent alcohol.
Remove slides, submerge slides in water dish, remove slides, discard water, and refill dish with fresh tap water. Repeat 2 or 3 more times.
Prepare eleven staining dishes: Hematoxylin (1) Define solution (1) Bluing solution (1) Eosin-Y with phloxine (1) 100% reagent alcohol (3) Xylene (3) Tap water (1)
Begin staining by submerging slides in hematoxylin dish for 1 minute.
Remove slides from stain and rinse with running tap water until water runs clear, approximately 1 minute.
Submerge slides in define solution for 1 minute.
Remove slides, submerge slides in water dish, remove slides, discard water, and refill dish with fresh tap water. Repeat 2 or 3 more times.
Submerge slides in bluing solution for 1 minute.
Remove slides, submerge slides in water dish, remove slides, discard water, and refill dish with fresh tap water. Repeat 2 or 3 more times.
Submerge slides in eosin for 1 minute.
Remove slides, submerge slides in water dish, remove slides, discard water, and refill dish with fresh tap water. Repeat 2 or 3 more times.
Air dry slides in slide holder for 15 minutes.

Submerge slides in the first reagent alcohol dish for 1 minute. Repeat this step twice more, removing and submerging into the next reagent alcohol dish, for a total of three submersions in reagent alcohol.
Remove slides and submerge in the first xylene dish for 1 minute. Repeat this step twice more, removing and submerging into the next xylene dish, for a total of three submersions in xylene.
Apply coverslip to the slides and let air dry for 1 or 2 days.
Air dry slides in slide holder for 15 minutes.
Drain excess xylene and apply coverslip mounting medium.
creator: Cayla Mason
